entry.title: [golang-nuts] How to efficiently process large slices without allocation?
entry.content: I have been working on a hot path that processes millions of items per second. The current approach allocates a new slice for each batch. Has anyone found a good pattern using sync.Pool or similar?

entry.title: [golang-nuts] Re: Proposal: add slices.Flatten to the standard library
entry.content: I agree with the proposal. Adding slices.Flatten would be consistent with the existing slices package design and would cover a common use case without requiring external dependencies.
